name: Potential C2 Communication over a Non-Application Layer Protocol
notes: This rule detects adversaries using a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powercat Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netcat Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: C2 Session over ICMP
TD_list: APPLY Potential C2 Communication over a Non-Application Layer Protocol on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powercat Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Netcat Execution, BB:BehaviorDefinition: C2 Session over ICMP
RED_list: Event name: Potential C2 Communication over a Non-Application Layer Protocol
Event description: Detects adversaries using a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
